events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes form build & bracing work that is at the "rough-complete" stage. The progress photos show the current checkpoint scope finished for this area, with remaining work being cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint. Reference material is ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete).

No defects or hazards are mentioned. The work appears to be complete for the checkpoint being scored. This should be a pass.
